examples: Her speech was memorable for its polemic rather than its substance.
Popular linguistic debate regularly deteriorates into invective and polemic.
Readers of this overheated but often on-the-mark polemic will conclude that the safest tactic is organic food and a fly swatter.
In his polemic he attacks the six principal claims of the influential anti-global left.
The talk produced the polemic bite, the topical excitement that made the Review worth reading.
